title: sabench: A benchmark suite for variance-based global sensitivity analysis
description: sabench is a Python library providing a curated collection of benchmark functions and output transformations for testing and validating variance-based global sensitivity analysis (GSA) methods, including Sobol first-order and total-effect indices. It includes 19 scalar benchmarks, 7 functional/PDE benchmarks, 3 spatial benchmarks, and 172 output transformations with exhaustive metadata.
